who: paralegals in law firms managing 5–15 cases/month
offer: For paralegals in law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, missed legal document filing deadlines cause potential penalties. We provide deadline tracking instead of manual tracking through calendars and reminders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for paralegals seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to paralegals with a demo video
Share in community forums for legal professionals
try_it: Let users try deadline tracking on 1-3 cases
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
